# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pre_build_commands:
        description: 'Pre-build commands to execute'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      build_commands:
        description: 'Main build commands to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      post_build_commands:
        description: 'Post-build commands to execute'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for build commands'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '.'
      shell_type:
        description: 'Shell to use for command execution'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - pwsh
        default: 'bash'
      timeout_minutes:
        description: 'Timeout for build process in minutes'
        required: false
        type: number
        default: 30
      environment:
        description: 'Environment to deploy to'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
        default: 'development'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5
    outputs:
      commands_validated: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.validated }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate input commands
        id: validate
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          
          DANGEROUS_PATTERNS=(
            '\$\(.*\)'
            '`.*`'
            '\|\|'
            '&&.*rm'
            'eval'
            'exec'
            ';.*rm'
            'curl.*\|.*sh'
            'wget.*\|.*sh'
            'nc -e'
            '/dev/tcp'
            'bash -i'
            'sh -i'
            '>\s*/dev'
            'chmod\s+[0-7]*7'
            'chown'
            'sudo'
            'su -'
            'mkfifo'
            'base64.*-d.*\|'
          )
          
          check_command() {
            local cmd="$1"
            local cmd_type="$2"
            
            if [ -z "$cmd" ]; then
              return 0
            fi
            
            for pattern in "${DANGEROUS_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
              if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE "$pattern"; then
                echo "::error::Potentially dangerous pattern detected in $cmd_type: $pattern"
                return 1
              fi
            done
            
            if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '[\x00-\x08\x0B\x0C\x0E-\x1F]'; then
              echo "::error::Control characters detected in $cmd_type"
              return 1
            fi
            
            return 0
          }
          
          PRE_BUILD="${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}"
          BUILD="${{ inputs.build_commands }}"
          POST_BUILD="${{ inputs.post_build_commands }}"
          
          check_command "$PRE_BUILD" "pre_build_commands" || exit 1
          check_command "$BUILD" "build_commands" || exit 1
          check_command "$POST_BUILD" "post_build_commands" || exit 1
          
          echo "validated=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "::notice::All input commands validated successfully"

  custom-build:
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout_minutes) }}
    environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup secure environment
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          
          echo "Setting up secure build environment..."
          
          export PATH="/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
          echo "PATH=$PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          
          unset AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
          unset GITHUB_TOKEN GH_TOKEN
          
          umask 0022
          
          echo "SECURE_ENV_SETUP=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Validate working directory
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          
          WORK_DIR="${{ inputs.working_directory }}"
          
          if [[ "$WORK_DIR" =~ \.\. ]] || [[ "$WORK_DIR" =~ ^/ ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid working directory path"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          WORK_DIR=$(echo "$WORK_DIR" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._/-]//g')
          
          if [ ! -d "$WORK_DIR" ]; then
            echo "::notice::Creating working directory: $WORK_DIR"
            mkdir -p "$WORK_DIR"
          fi
          
          echo "VALIDATED_WORK_DIR=$WORK_DIR" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Execute pre-build commands
        if: inputs.pre_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ env.VALIDATED_WORK_DIR }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.shell_type == 'bash' && 'set -euo pipefail' || '$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"' }}
          
          echo "Executing pre-build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}

      - name: Execute main build commands
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ env.VALIDATED_WORK_DIR }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.shell_type == 'bash' && 'set -euo pipefail' || '$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"' }}
          
          echo "Executing main build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.build_commands }}

      - name: Execute post-build commands
        if: inputs.post_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ env.VALIDATED_WORK_DIR }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.shell_type == 'bash' && 'set -euo pipefail' || '$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"' }}
          
          echo "Executing post-build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.post_build_commands }}

      - name: Sanitize build artifacts
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          
          echo "Sanitizing build artifacts..."
          
          find ${{ env.VALIDATED_WORK_DIR }} -type f -name "*.log" -exec sed -i 's/[Pp][Aa][Ss][Ss][Ww][Oo][Rr][Dd]=[^ ]*/PASSWORD=***/g' {} \;
          find ${{ env.VALIDATED_WORK_DIR }} -type f -name "*.log" -exec sed -i 's/[Tt][Oo][Kk][Ee][Nn]=[^ ]*/TOKEN=***/g' {} \;
          find ${{ env.VALIDATED_WORK_DIR }} -type f -name "*.log" -exec sed -i 's/[Aa][Pp][Ii][_-][Kk][Ee][Yy]=[^ ]*/API_KEY=***/g' {} \;

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: success()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ env.VALIDATED_WORK_DIR }}
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn

  security-scan:
    needs: custom-build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ./artifacts

      - name: Run security scan
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          
          echo "Running security scan on build artifacts..."
          
          find ./artifacts -type f -executable -ls || true
          
          find ./artifacts -type f -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.bash" | while read -r file; do
            if grep -qE '(eval|exec|system|passthru)' "$file"; then
              echo "::warning::Potentially dangerous code found in $file"
            fi
          done
          
          echo "Security scan completed"
